 90â†’/**
 91â†’ * This rule inserts missing newlines (e.g. between parentheses of a multi-line function call). This logic previously
 92â†’ * was part of the IndentationRule (phase 1).
 93â†’ *
 94â†’ * Whenever a linebreak is inserted, this rules assumes that the parent node it indented correctly. So the indentation
 95â†’ * is fixed with respect to indentation of the parent. This is just a simple best effort for the case that the
 96â†’ * indentation rule is not run.
 97â†’ */
 98â†’public class WrappingRule :
 99â†’    StandardRule(
100â†’        id = "wrapping",
101â†’        usesEditorConfigProperties =
102â†’            setOf(
103â†’                INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY,
104â†’                INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY,
105â†’                MAX_LINE_LENGTH_PROPERTY,
106â†’            ),
107â†’        visitorModifiers =
108â†’            setOf(
109â†’                RunAfterRule(
110â†’                    ruleId = ANNOTATION_RULE_ID,
111â†’                    mode = REGARDLESS_WHETHER_RUN_AFTER_RULE_IS_LOADED_OR_DISABLED,
112â†’                ),
113â†’            ),
114â†’    ) {
115â†’    private var line = 1
116â†’    private var indentConfig = DEFAULT_INDENT_CONFIG
117â†’    private var maxLineLength: Int = MAX_LINE_LENGTH_PROPERTY.defaultValue
118â†’
119â†’    override fun beforeFirstNode(editorConfig: EditorConfig) {
120â†’        line = 1
121â†’        indentConfig =
122â†’            IndentConfig(
123â†’                indentStyle = editorConfig[INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY],
124â†’                tabWidth = editorConfig[INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY],
125â†’            )
126â†’        maxLineLength = editorConfig[MAX_LINE_LENGTH_PROPERTY]
127â†’    }
128â†’
129â†’    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
130â†’        node: ASTNode,
131â†’        autoCorrect: Boolean,
132â†’        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
133â†’    ) {
134â†’        when (node.elementType) {
135â†’            BLOCK -> beforeVisitBlock(node, autoCorrect, emit)
136â†’            LPAR, LBRACKET -> rearrangeBlock(node, autoCorrect, emit)
137â†’            SUPER_TYPE_LIST -> rearrangeSuperTypeList(node, autoCorrect, emit)
138â†’            VALUE_PARAMETER_LIST, VALUE_ARGUMENT_LIST -> rearrangeValueList(node, autoCorrect, emit)
139â†’            TYPE_ARGUMENT_LIST, TYPE_PARAMETER_LIST -> rearrangeTypeArgumentList(node, autoCorrect, emit)
140â†’            ARROW -> rearrangeArrow(node, autoCorrect, emit)
141â†’            WHITE_SPACE -> line += node.text.count { it == '\n' }
142â†’            CLOSING_QUOTE -> rearrangeClosingQuote(node, autoCorrect, emit)
143â†’            SEMICOLON -> insertNewLineAfterSemi(node, autoCorrect, emit)
144â†’        }
145â†’    }
146â†’
147â†’    private fun beforeVisitBlock(
148â†’        node: ASTNode,
149â†’        autoCorrect: Boolean,
150â†’        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
151â†’    ) {
152â†’        require(node.elementType == BLOCK)
153â†’
154â†’        val lbrace =
155â†’            node
156â†’                .getStartOfBlock()
157â†’                ?.takeIf { it.elementType == LBRACE }
158â†’                ?: return
159â†’        if (lbrace.followedByNewline() ||
160â†’            lbrace.followedByEolComment() ||
161â†’            lbrace.isPartOf(LONG_STRING_TEMPLATE_ENTRY)
162â†’        ) {
163â†’            // String template inside raw string literal may exceed the maximum line length
164â†’            return
165â†’        }
166â†’
167â†’        node
168â†’            .takeUnless { it.firstChildLeafOrSelf().elementType == EOL_COMMENT }
169â†’            ?.getEndOfBlock()
170â†’            ?.takeIf { it.elementType == RBRACE }
171â†’            ?.let { rbrace ->
172â†’                if (hasNewLineInClosedRange(lbrace, rbrace)) {
173â†’                    requireNewlineAfterLeaf(lbrace, autoCorrect, emit)
174â†’                }
175â†’            }
176â†’
177â†’        if (maxLineLength != MAX_LINE_LENGTH_PROPERTY_OFF) {
178â†’            val lengthUntilBeginOfLine =
179â†’                node
180â†’                    .leaves(false)
181â†’                    .takeWhile { !it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
182â†’                    .sumOf { it.textLength }
183â†’            val lengthUntilEndOfLine =
184â†’                node
185â†’                    .firstChildLeafOrSelf()
186â†’                    .leavesIncludingSelf()
187â†’                    .takeWhile { !it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
188â†’                    .sumOf { it.textLength }
189â†’            if (lengthUntilBeginOfLine + lengthUntilEndOfLine > maxLineLength) {
190â†’                requireNewlineAfterLeaf(lbrace, autoCorrect, emit)
191â†’            }
192â†’        }
193â†’    }
194â†’
195â†’    private fun ASTNode.followedByEolComment() =
196â†’        null !=
197â†’            leaves()
198â†’                .takeWhile { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() || it.elementType == EOL_COMMENT }
199â†’                .firstOrNull { it.elementType == EOL_COMMENT }
200â†’
201â†’    private fun rearrangeBlock(
202â†’        node: ASTNode,
203â†’        autoCorrect: Boolean,
204â†’        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
205â†’    ) {
206â†’        val rElementType = MATCHING_RTOKEN_MAP[node.elementType]
207â†’        var newlineInBetween = false
208â†’        var parameterListInBetween = false
209â†’        var numberOfArgs = 0
210â†’        var firstArg: ASTNode? = null
211â†’        // matching ), ] or }
212â†’        val r = node.nextSibling {
213â†’            val isValueArgument = it.elementType == VALUE_ARGUMENT
214â†’            val hasLineBreak = if (isValueArgument) it.hasLineBreak(LAMBDA_EXPRESSION, FUN) else it.hasLineBreak()
215â†’            newlineInBetween = newlineInBetween || hasLineBreak
216â†’            parameterListInBetween = parameterListInBetween || it.elementType == VALUE_PARAMETER_LIST
217â†’            if (isValueArgument) {
218â†’                numberOfArgs++
219â†’                firstArg = it
220â†’            }
221â†’            it.elementType == rElementType
222â†’        }!!
223â†’        if (
224â†’            !newlineInBetween ||
225â†’            // keep { p ->
226â†’            // }
227â†’            (node.elementType == LBRACE && parameterListInBetween) ||
228â†’            // keep ({
229â†’            // }) and (object : C {
230â†’            // })
231â†’            (
232â†’                numberOfArgs == 1 &&
233â†’                    firstArg?.firstChildNode?.elementType
234â†’                        ?.let { it == OBJECT_LITERAL || it == LAMBDA_EXPRESSION } == true
235â†’                )
236â†’        ) {
237â†’            return
238â†’        }
239â†’        if (node.isPartOfForLoopConditionWithMultilineExpression()) {
240â†’            // keep:
241â†’            // for (foo in listOf(
242â†’            //     "foo-1",
243â†’            //     "foo-2"
244â†’            // )) { ... }
245â†’            // but reject:
246â†’            // for (
247â†’            //     foo in listOf(
248â†’            //         "foo-1",
249â†’            //         "foo-2"
250â†’            //     )
251â†’            // ) { ... }
252â†’            return
253â†’        }
254â†’        if (!node.nextCodeLeaf()?.prevLeaf {
255â†’                // Skip comments, whitespace, and empty nodes
256â†’                !it.isPartOfComment() &&
257â†’                    !it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() &&
258â†’                    it.textLength > 0
259â†’            }.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() &&
260â†’            // IDEA quirk:
261â†’            // if (true &&
262â†’            //     true
263â†’            // ) {
264â†’            // }
265â†’            // instead of
266â†’            // if (
267â†’            //     true &&
268â†’            //     true
269â†’            // ) {
270â†’            // }
271â†’            node.treeNext?.elementType != CONDITION
272â†’        ) {
273â†’            requireNewlineAfterLeaf(node, autoCorrect, emit)
274â†’        }
275â†’        if (!r.prevLeaf().isWhiteSpaceWithNewline()) {
276â†’            requireNewlineBeforeLeaf(r, autoCorrect, emit, indentConfig.parentIndentOf(node))
277â†’        }
278â†’    }
279â†’
280â†’    private fun rearrangeSuperTypeList(
281â†’        node: ASTNode,
282â†’        autoCorrect: Boolean,
283â†’        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
284â†’    ) {
285â†’        val entries = (node.psi as KtSuperTypeList).entries
286â†’        if (
287â†’            node.textContains('\n') &&
288â†’            entries.size > 1 &&
289â†’            // e.g.
290â†’            //
291â†’            // class A : B, C,
292â†’            //     D
293â†’            // or
294â†’            // class A : B, C({
295â†’            // }), D
296â†’            //
297â†’            // but not
298â†’            //
299â†’            // class A : B, C, D({
300â†’            // })
301â†’            !(
302â†’                entries.dropLast(1).all { it.elementType == SUPER_TYPE_ENTRY } &&
303â†’                    entries.last().elementType == SUPER_TYPE_CALL_ENTRY
304â†’                )
305â†’        ) {
306â†’            // put space after :
307â†’            if (!node.prevLeaf().isWhiteSpaceWithNewline()) {
308â†’                val colon = node.prevCodeLeaf()!!
309â†’                if (
310â†’                    !colon.prevLeaf().isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() &&
311â†’                    colon.prevCodeLeaf().let { it?.elementType != RPAR || !it.prevLeaf().isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
312â†’                ) {
313â†’                    requireNewlineAfterLeaf(colon, autoCorrect, emit)
314â†’                }
315â†’            }
316â†’            // put entries on separate lines
317â†’            for (c in node.children()) {
318â†’                if (c.elementType == COMMA &&
319â†’                    !c.treeNext.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() &&
320â†’                    !c.isFollowedByCommentOnSameLine()
321â†’                ) {
322â†’                    requireNewlineAfterLeaf(
323â†’                        nodeAfterWhichNewlineIsRequired = c,
324â†’                        autoCorrect = autoCorrect,
325â†’                        emit = emit,
326â†’                        indent = node.indent(),
327â†’                    )
328â†’                }
329â†’            }
330â†’        }
331â†’    }
332â†’
333â†’    private fun ASTNode.isFollowedByCommentOnSameLine() =
334â†’        nextLeaf { !it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() }
335â†’            ?.isPartOfComment() == true
336â†’
337â†’    private fun rearrangeValueList(
338â†’        node: ASTNode,
339â†’        autoCorrect: Boolean,
340â†’        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
341â†’    ) {
342â†’        for (c in node.children()) {
343â†’            val hasLineBreak =
344â†’                when (c.elementType) {
345â†’                    VALUE_ARGUMENT -> c.hasLineBreak(LAMBDA_EXPRESSION, FUN)
346â†’                    VALUE_PARAMETER, ANNOTATION -> c.hasLineBreak()
347â†’                    else -> false
348â†’                }
349â†’            if (hasLineBreak) {
350â†’                // rearrange
351â†’                //
352â†’                // a, b, value(
353â†’                // ), c, d
354â†’                //
355â†’                // to
356â†’                //
357â†’                // a, b,
358â†’                // value(
359â†’                // ),
360â†’                // c, d
361â†’
362â†’                // insert \n in front of multi-line value
363â†’                val prevSibling = c.prevSibling { it.elementType != WHITE_SPACE }
364â†’                if (
365â†’                    prevSibling?.elementType == COMMA &&
366â†’                    !prevSibling.treeNext.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline()
367â†’                ) {
368â†’                    requireNewlineAfterLeaf(prevSibling, autoCorrect, emit)
369â†’                }
370â†’                // insert \n after multi-line value
371â†’                val nextSibling = c.nextSibling { it.elementType != WHITE_SPACE }
372â†’                val hasDestructuringDeclarationAsLastValueParameter =
373â†’                    c.isLastValueParameter() && c.firstChildNode.elementType == DESTRUCTURING_DECLARATION
374â†’                if (
375â†’                    nextSibling?.elementType == COMMA &&
376â†’                    !hasDestructuringDeclarationAsLastValueParameter &&
377â†’                    !nextSibling.treeNext.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() &&
378â†’                    // value(
379â†’                    // ), // a comment
380â†’                    // c, d
381â†’                    nextSibling.treeNext?.treeNext?.psi !is PsiComment
382â†’                ) {
383â†’                    requireNewlineAfterLeaf(nextSibling, autoCorrect, emit)
384â†’                }
385â†’            }
386â†’        }
387â†’    }
388â†’
389â†’    private fun ASTNode.isLastValueParameter() =
390â†’        elementType == VALUE_PARAMETER &&
391â†’            siblings().none { it.elementType == VALUE_PARAMETER }
392â†’
393â†’    private fun rearrangeTypeArgumentList(
394â†’        node: ASTNode,
395â†’        autoCorrect: Boolean,
396â†’        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
397â†’    ) {
398â†’        if (node.textContains('\n')) {
399â†’            // Each type projection must be preceded with a whitespace containing a newline
400â†’            node
401â†’                .children()
402â†’                .filter { it.elementType == TYPE_PROJECTION || it.elementType == TYPE_PARAMETER }
403â†’                .forEach { typeProjection ->
404â†’                    typeProjection
405â†’                        .prevSibling { !it.isPartOfComment() }
406â†’                        .let { prevSibling ->
407â†’                            if (prevSibling?.elementType == LT || prevSibling.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline()) {
408â†’                                emit(typeProjection.startOffset, "A newline was expected before '${typeProjection.text}'", true)
409â†’                                if (autoCorrect) {
410â†’                                    typeProjection.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(indentConfig.siblingIndentOf(node))
411â†’                                }
412â†’                            }
413â†’                        }
414â†’                }
415â†’
416â†’            // After the last type projection a whitespace containing a newline must exist
417â†’            node
418â†’                .findChildByType(GT)
419â†’                ?.let { closingAngle ->
420â†’                    val prevSibling = closingAngle.prevSibling { !it.isPartOfComment() }
421â†’                    if (prevSibling?.elementType != WHITE_SPACE || prevSibling.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline()) {
422â†’                        emit(closingAngle.startOffset, "A newline was expected before '${closingAngle.text}'", true)
423â†’                        if (autoCorrect) {
424â†’                            closingAngle.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(indentConfig.siblingIndentOf(node))
425â†’                        }
426â†’                    }
427â†’                }
428â†’
429â†’            Unit
430â†’        }
431â†’    }
432â†’
433â†’    private fun rearrangeClosingQuote(
434â†’        node: ASTNode,
435â†’        autoCorrect: Boolean,
436â†’        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
437â†’    ) {
438â†’        node
439â†’            .treeParent
440â†’            .takeIf { it.elementType == STRING_TEMPLATE }
441â†’            ?.let { it.psi as KtStringTemplateExpression }
442â†’            ?.takeIf { it.isMultiLine() }
443â†’            ?.takeIf { it.isFollowedByTrimIndent() || it.isFollowedByTrimMargin() }
444â†’            ?.takeIf { node.treePrev.text.isNotBlank() }
445â†’            ?.let {
446â†’                // rewriting
447â†’                // """
448â†’                //     text
449â†’                // _""".trimIndent()
450â†’                // to
451â†’                // """
452â†’                //     text
453â†’                // _
454â†’                // """.trimIndent()
455â†’                emit(
456â†’                    node.startOffset,
457â†’                    "Missing newline before \"\"\"",
458â†’                    true,
459â†’                )
460â†’                if (autoCorrect) {
461â†’                    node as LeafPsiElement
462â†’                    node.rawInsertBeforeMe(LeafPsiElement(LITERAL_STRING_TEMPLATE_ENTRY, "\n"))
463â†’                }
464â†’                LOGGER.trace { "$line: " + (if (!autoCorrect) "would have " else "") + "inserted newline before (closing) \"\"\"" }
465â†’            }
466â†’    }
467â†’
468â†’    private fun mustBeFollowedByNewline(node: ASTNode): Boolean {
469â†’        // find EOL token (last token before \n)
470â†’        // if token is in lTokenSet
471â†’        //     find matching rToken
472â†’        //     return true if there is no newline after the rToken
473â†’        // return false
474â†’        val nextCodeSibling = node.nextCodeSibling() // e.g. BINARY_EXPRESSION
475â†’        var lToken = nextCodeSibling?.nextLeaf { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }?.prevCodeLeaf()
476â†’        if (lToken != null && lToken.elementType !in LTOKEN_SET) {
477â†’            // special cases:
478â†’            // x = y.f({ z ->
479â†’            // })
480â†’            // x = y.f(0, 1,
481â†’            // 2, 3)
482â†’            lToken = lToken.prevLeaf { it.elementType in LTOKEN_SET || it == node }
483â†’        }
484â†’        if (lToken != null && lToken.elementType in LTOKEN_SET) {
485â†’            val rElementType = MATCHING_RTOKEN_MAP[lToken.elementType]
486â†’            val rToken = lToken.nextSibling { it.elementType == rElementType }
487â†’            return rToken?.treeParent == lToken.treeParent
488â†’        }
489â†’        if (nextCodeSibling?.textContains('\n') == false) {
490â†’            return true
491â†’        }
492â†’        return false
493â†’    }
494â†’
495â†’    private fun rearrangeArrow(
496â†’        node: ASTNode,
497â†’        autoCorrect: Boolean,
498â†’        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
499â†’    ) {
500â†’        val p = node.treeParent
501â†’        if (
502â†’            // check
503â†’            // `{ p -> ... }`
504â†’            // and
505â†’            // `when { m -> ... }`
506â†’            // only
507â†’            p.elementType.let { it != FUNCTION_LITERAL && it != WHEN_ENTRY } ||
508â†’            // ... and only if expression after -> spans multiple lines
509â†’            !p.textContains('\n') ||
510â†’            // permit
511â†’            // when {
512â†’            //     m -> 0 + d({
513â†’            //     })
514â†’            // }
515â†’            (p.elementType == WHEN_ENTRY && mustBeFollowedByNewline(node)) ||
516â†’            // permit
517â†’            // when (this) {
518â†’            //     in 0x1F600..0x1F64F, // Emoticons
519â†’            //     0x200D // Zero-width Joiner
520â†’            //     -> true
521â†’            // }
522â†’            (p.elementType == WHEN_ENTRY && node.prevLeaf()?.textContains('\n') == true)
523â†’        ) {
524â†’            return
525â†’        }
526â†’        if (!node.nextCodeLeaf()?.prevLeaf().isWhiteSpaceWithNewline()) {
527â†’            requireNewlineAfterLeaf(node, autoCorrect, emit)
528â†’        }
529â†’        val r = node.nextSibling { it.elementType == RBRACE } ?: return
530â†’        if (!r.prevLeaf().isWhiteSpaceWithNewline()) {
531â†’            requireNewlineBeforeLeaf(r, autoCorrect, emit, node.indent())
532â†’        }
533â†’    }
534â†’
535â†’    private fun insertNewLineAfterSemi(
536â†’        node: ASTNode,
537â†’        autoCorrect: Boolean,
538â†’        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
539â†’    ) {
540â†’        val previousCodeLeaf = node.prevCodeLeaf()?.lastChildLeafOrSelf() ?: return
541â†’        val nextCodeLeaf = node.nextCodeLeaf()?.firstChildLeafOrSelf() ?: return
542â†’        if (previousCodeLeaf.treeParent.elementType == ENUM_ENTRY && nextCodeLeaf.elementType == RBRACE) {
543â†’            // Allow
544â†’            // enum class INDEX2 { ONE, TWO, THREE; }
545â†’            return
546â†’        }
547â†’        if (noNewLineInClosedRange(previousCodeLeaf, nextCodeLeaf)) {
548â†’            requireNewlineAfterLeaf(node, autoCorrect, emit, previousCodeLeaf.indent())
549â†’            node
550â†’                .treeParent
551â†’                .takeIf { it.elementType == BLOCK }
552â†’                ?.let { block ->
553â†’                    beforeVisitBlock(block, autoCorrect, emit)
554â†’                    block
555â†’                        .treeParent
556â†’                        .takeIf { it.elementType == FUNCTION_LITERAL }
557â†’                        ?.findChildByType(ARROW)
558â†’                        ?.let { arrow -> rearrangeArrow(arrow, autoCorrect, emit) }
559â†’                }
560â†’        }
561â†’    }
562â†’
563â†’    private fun requireNewlineBeforeLeaf(
564â†’        node: ASTNode,
565â†’        autoCorrect: Boolean,
566â†’        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
567â†’        indent: String,
568â†’    ) {
569â†’        emit(
570â†’            node.startOffset - 1,
571â†’            """Missing newline before "${node.text}"""",
572â†’            true,
573â†’        )
574â†’        LOGGER.trace { "$line: " + ((if (!autoCorrect) "would have " else "") + "inserted newline before ${node.text}") }
575â†’        if (autoCorrect) {
576â†’            node.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(indent)
577â†’        }
578â†’    }
579â†’
580â†’    private fun requireNewlineAfterLeaf(
581â†’        nodeAfterWhichNewlineIsRequired: ASTNode,
582â†’        autoCorrect: Boolean,
583â†’        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
584â†’        indent: String? = null,
585â†’        nodeToFix: ASTNode = nodeAfterWhichNewlineIsRequired,
586â†’    ) {
587â†’        emit(
588â†’            nodeAfterWhichNewlineIsRequired.startOffset + 1,
589â†’            """Missing newline after "${nodeAfterWhichNewlineIsRequired.text}"""",
590â†’            true,
591â†’        )
592â†’        LOGGER.trace {
593â†’            "$line: " + (if (!autoCorrect) "would have " else "") + "inserted newline after ${nodeAfterWhichNewlineIsRequired.text}"
594â†’        }
595â†’        if (autoCorrect) {
596â†’            val tempIndent = indent ?: (indentConfig.childIndentOf(nodeToFix))
597â†’            nodeToFix.upsertWhitespaceAfterMe(tempIndent)
598â†’        }
599â†’    }

601â†’    private fun KtStringTemplateExpression.isMultiLine(): Boolean {
602â†’        for (child in node.children()) {
603â†’            if (child.elementType == LITERAL_STRING_TEMPLATE_ENTRY) {
604â†’                val v = child.text
605â†’                if (v == "\n") {
606â†’                    return true
607â†’                }
608â†’            }
609â†’        }
610â†’        return false
611â†’    }

613â†’    private fun ASTNode.hasLineBreak(vararg ignoreElementTypes: IElementType): Boolean {
614â†’        if (isWhiteSpaceWithNewline()) return true
615â†’        return if (ignoreElementTypes.isEmpty()) {
616â†’            textContains('\n')
617â†’        } else {
618â†’            elementType !in ignoreElementTypes &&
619â†’                children().any { c -> c.textContains('\n') && c.elementType !in ignoreElementTypes }
620â†’        }
621â†’    }
622â†’
623â†’    private fun KtStringTemplateExpression.isFollowedByTrimIndent() = isFollowedBy("trimIndent()")
624â†’
625â†’    private fun KtStringTemplateExpression.isFollowedByTrimMargin() = isFollowedBy("trimMargin()")
626â†’
627â†’    private fun KtStringTemplateExpression.isFollowedBy(callExpressionName: String) =
628â†’        this.node.nextSibling { it.elementType != DOT }
629â†’            .let { it?.elementType == CALL_EXPRESSION && it.text == callExpressionName }
630â†’
631â†’    /**
632â†’     *  Allow for-statement in which only the expression contains a newline:
633â†’     *     for (foo in listOf(
634â†’     *         "foo-1",
635â†’     *         "foo-2"
636â†’     *     )) { ... }
637â†’     * but reject:
638â†’     *     for (
639â†’     *         foo in listOf(
640â†’     *             "foo-1",
641â†’     *             "foo-2"
642â†’     *         )
643â†’     *     ) { ... }
644â†’     */
645â†’    private fun ASTNode.isPartOfForLoopConditionWithMultilineExpression(): Boolean {
646â†’        if (treeParent.elementType != ElementType.FOR) {
647â†’            return false
648â†’        }
649â†’        if (this.elementType != LPAR) {
650â†’            return treeParent.findChildByType(LPAR)!!.isPartOfForLoopConditionWithMultilineExpression()
651â†’        }
652â†’        require(elementType == LPAR) {
653â†’            "Node should be the LPAR of the FOR loop"
654â†’        }
655â†’
656â†’        var node: ASTNode? = this
657â†’        while (node != null && node.elementType != RPAR) {
658â†’            if (node.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline()) {
659â†’                return false
660â†’            }
661â†’            node = node.nextSibling()
662â†’        }
663â†’        return true
664â†’    }
665â†’
666â†’    override fun afterVisitChildNodes(
667â†’        node: ASTNode,
668â†’        autoCorrect: Boolean,
669â†’        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
670â†’    ) {
671â†’        if (node.elementType == BLOCK) {
672â†’            val lbrace =
673â†’                node
674â†’                    .getStartOfBlock()
675â†’                    ?.takeIf { it.elementType == LBRACE }
676â†’                    ?: return
677â†’            node
678â†’                .getEndOfBlock()
679â†’                ?.takeUnless { it.isPrecededByNewline() }
680â†’                ?.let { rbrace ->
681â†’                    if (hasNewLineInClosedRange(lbrace, rbrace)) {

 90â†’/**
 91â†’ * This rule inserts missing newlines (e.g. between parentheses of a multi-line function call). This logic previously
 92â†’ * was part of the IndentationRule (phase 1).
 93â†’ *
 94â†’ * Whenever a linebreak is inserted, this rules assumes that the parent node it indented correctly. So the indentation
 95â†’ * is fixed with respect to indentation of the parent. This is just a simple best effort for the case that the
 96â†’ * indentation rule is not run.
 97â†’ */

216â†’            parameterListInBetween = parameterListInBetween || it.elementType == VALUE_PARAMETER_LIST
217â†’            if (isValueArgument) {

219â†’                firstArg = it

221â†’            it.elementType == rElementType
222â†’        }!!
223â†’        if (
224â†’            !newlineInBetween ||
225â†’            // keep { p ->
226â†’            // }
227â†’            (node.elementType == LBRACE && parameterListInBetween) ||
228â†’            // keep ({
229â†’            // }) and (object : C {
230â†’            // })
231â†’            (

238â†’        }

254â†’        if (!node.nextCodeLeaf()?.prevLeaf {

264â†’            // }
265â†’            // instead of

268â†’            //     true

271â†’            node.treeNext?.elementType != CONDITION

290â†’            //
291â†’            // class A : B, C,
292â†’            //     D
293â†’            // or

296â†’            //
297â†’            // but not

302â†’                entries.dropLast(1).all { it.elementType == SUPER_TYPE_ENTRY } &&
303â†’                    entries.last().elementType == SUPER_TYPE_CALL_ENTRY

312â†’                ) {

314â†’                }
315â†’            }
316â†’            // put entries on separate lines
317â†’            for (c in node.children()) {

319â†’                    !c.treeNext.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() &&
320â†’                    !c.isFollowedByCommentOnSameLine()

337â†’    private fun rearrangeValueList(
338â†’        node: ASTNode,
339â†’        autoCorrect: Boolean,
340â†’        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
341â†’    ) {
342â†’        for (c in node.children()) {
343â†’            val hasLineBreak =
344â†’                when (c.elementType) {
345â†’                    VALUE_ARGUMENT -> c.hasLineBreak(LAMBDA_EXPRESSION, FUN)
346â†’                    VALUE_PARAMETER, ANNOTATION -> c.hasLineBreak()
347â†’                    else -> false
348â†’                }
349â†’            if (hasLineBreak) {
350â†’                // rearrange
351â†’                //
352â†’                // a, b, value(
353â†’                // ), c, d
354â†’                //
355â†’                // to
356â†’                //
357â†’                // a, b,
358â†’                // value(
359â†’                // ),
360â†’                // c, d
361â†’
362â†’                // insert \n in front of multi-line value
363â†’                val prevSibling = c.prevSibling { it.elementType != WHITE_SPACE }
364â†’                if (
365â†’                    prevSibling?.elementType == COMMA &&
366â†’                    !prevSibling.treeNext.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline()
367â†’                ) {
368â†’                    requireNewlineAfterLeaf(prevSibling, autoCorrect, emit)
369â†’                }
370â†’                // insert \n after multi-line value
371â†’                val nextSibling = c.nextSibling { it.elementType != WHITE_SPACE }
372â†’                val hasDestructuringDeclarationAsLastValueParameter =
373â†’                    c.isLastValueParameter() && c.firstChildNode.elementType == DESTRUCTURING_DECLARATION
374â†’                if (
375â†’                    nextSibling?.elementType == COMMA &&
376â†’                    !hasDestructuringDeclarationAsLastValueParameter &&
377â†’                    !nextSibling.treeNext.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() &&
378â†’                    // value(
379â†’                    // ), // a comment
380â†’                    // c, d
381â†’                    nextSibling.treeNext?.treeNext?.psi !is PsiComment
382â†’                ) {
383â†’                    requireNewlineAfterLeaf(nextSibling, autoCorrect, emit)
384â†’                }
385â†’            }
386â†’        }
387â†’    }

 39â†’public class ParameterListWrappingRule :
 40â†’    StandardRule(
 41â†’        id = "parameter-list-wrapping",
 42â†’        usesEditorConfigProperties =
 43â†’            setOf(
 44â†’                CODE_STYLE_PROPERTY,
 45â†’                INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY,
 46â†’                INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY,
 47â†’                MAX_LINE_LENGTH_PROPERTY,
 48â†’            ),
 49â†’    ) {
 50â†’    private var codeStyle = CODE_STYLE_PROPERTY.defaultValue
 51â†’    private var indentConfig = IndentConfig.DEFAULT_INDENT_CONFIG
 52â†’    private var maxLineLength = MAX_LINE_LENGTH_PROPERTY.defaultValue
 53â†’
 54â†’    override fun beforeFirstNode(editorConfig: EditorConfig) {
 55â†’        codeStyle = editorConfig[CODE_STYLE_PROPERTY]
 56â†’        maxLineLength = editorConfig[MAX_LINE_LENGTH_PROPERTY]
 57â†’        indentConfig =
 58â†’            IndentConfig(
 59â†’                indentStyle = editorConfig[INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY],
 60â†’                tabWidth = editorConfig[INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY],
 61â†’            )
 62â†’        if (indentConfig.disabled) {
 63â†’            stopTraversalOfAST()
 64â†’        }
 65â†’    }
 66â†’
 67â†’    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
 68â†’        node: ASTNode,
 69â†’        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 70â†’        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 71â†’    ) {
 72â†’        when (node.elementType) {
 73â†’            NULLABLE_TYPE -> wrapNullableType(node, emit, autoCorrect)
 74â†’            VALUE_PARAMETER_LIST -> {
 75â†’                if (node.needToWrapParameterList()) {
 76â†’                    wrapParameterList(node, emit, autoCorrect)
 77â†’                }
 78â†’            }
 79â†’        }
 80â†’    }
 81â†’
 82â†’    private fun wrapNullableType(
 83â†’        node: ASTNode,
 84â†’        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 85â†’        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 86â†’    ) {
 87â†’        require(node.elementType == NULLABLE_TYPE)
 88â†’        node
 89â†’            .takeUnless {
 90â†’                // skip when max line length is not exceeded
 91â†’                (node.column - 1 + node.textLength) <= maxLineLength
 92â†’            }?.takeUnless { it.textContains('\n') }
 93â†’            ?.takeIf { it.isFunctionTypeWithNonEmptyValueParameterList() }
 94â†’            ?.let { nullableType ->
 95â†’                nullableType
 96â†’                    .findChildByType(LPAR)
 97â†’                    ?.takeUnless { it.nextLeaf()?.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() == true }
 98â†’                    ?.let { lpar ->
 99â†’                        emit(
100â†’                            lpar.startOffset + 1,
101â†’                            "Expected new line before function type as it does not fit on a single line",
102â†’                            true,
103â†’                        )
104â†’                        if (autoCorrect) {
105â†’                            lpar.upsertWhitespaceAfterMe(indentConfig.childIndentOf(node))
106â†’                        }
107â†’                    }
108â†’                nullableType
109â†’                    .findChildByType(RPAR)
110â†’                    ?.takeUnless { it.prevLeaf()?.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() == true }
111â†’                    ?.let { rpar ->
112â†’                        emit(
113â†’                            rpar.startOffset,
114â†’                            "Expected new line after function type as it does not fit on a single line",
115â†’                            true,
116â†’                        )
117â†’                        if (autoCorrect) {
118â†’                            rpar.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(indentConfig.parentIndentOf(node))
119â†’                        }
120â†’                    }
121â†’            }
122â†’    }
123â†’
124â†’    private fun ASTNode.isFunctionTypeWithNonEmptyValueParameterList() =
125â†’        null !=
126â†’            findChildByType(FUNCTION_TYPE)
127â†’                ?.findChildByType(VALUE_PARAMETER_LIST)
128â†’                ?.findChildByType(VALUE_PARAMETER)

130â†’    private fun ASTNode.needToWrapParameterList() =
131â†’        when {
132â†’            hasNoParameters() -> false
133â†’            codeStyle != ktlint_official && isPartOfFunctionLiteralInNonKtlintOfficialCodeStyle() -> false
134â†’            codeStyle == ktlint_official && isPartOfFunctionLiteralStartingOnSameLineAsClosingParenthesisOfPrecedingReferenceExpression() ->
135â†’                false
136â†’            // A function literal with a single line parameter list should not be wrapped solely because the line
137â†’            // exceeds the max line length. The parameter list should only be wrapped when it already is a multiline
138â†’            // parameter list. See https://github.com/pinterest/ktlint/issues/2101 and
139â†’            // https://github.com/pinterest/ktlint/issues/2106.
140â†’            codeStyle == ktlint_official && isPartOfFunctionLiteralWithSingleLineParameterList() -> false
141â†’            textContains('\n') -> true
142â†’            codeStyle == ktlint_official && containsAnnotatedParameter() -> true
143â†’            isOnLineExceedingMaxLineLength() -> true
144â†’            else -> false

164â†’                    ?.takeIf { it.treeParent.elementType == ElementType.VALUE_ARGUMENT_LIST }
165â†’                    ?.takeIf { it.treeParent.treeParent.elementType == ElementType.CALL_EXPRESSION }

167â†’                    ?.takeWhile { it != startOfFunctionLiteral }

173â†’    /**
174â†’     * A function literal with a single line parameter list should not be wrapped solely because the line exceeds the
175â†’     * max line length. The parameter list should only be wrapped when it already is a multiline parameter list.

185â†’        require(elementType == VALUE_PARAMETER_LIST)

193â†’            ?.children()
194â†’            .orEmpty()
195â†’            .any { it.elementType == ElementType.ANNOTATION_ENTRY }

197â†’    private fun wrapParameterList(
198â†’        node: ASTNode,
199â†’        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
200â†’        autoCorrect: Boolean,
201â†’    ) {
202â†’        node
203â†’            .children()
204â†’            .forEach { child -> wrapParameterInList(child, emit, autoCorrect) }
205â†’    }

207â†’    private fun intendedIndent(child: ASTNode): String =
208â†’        when {
209â†’            // IDEA quirk:
210â†’            // fun <
211â†’            //     T,
212â†’            //     R> test(
213â†’            //     param1: T
214â†’            //     param2: R
215â†’            // )
216â†’            // instead of
217â†’            // fun <
218â†’            //     T,
219â†’            //     R> test(
220â†’            //         param1: T
221â†’            //         param2: R
222â†’            //     )
223â†’            child.treeParent.isFunWithTypeParameterListInFront() -> -1
224â†’
225â†’            else -> 0
226â†’        }.let {
227â†’            if (child.elementType == VALUE_PARAMETER) {
228â†’                it + 1
229â†’            } else {
230â†’                it
231â†’            }
232â†’        }.let { indentLevelFix ->
233â†’            val indentLevel =
234â†’                indentConfig
235â†’                    .indentLevelFrom(child.treeParent.indent(false))
236â†’                    .plus(indentLevelFix)
237â†’            "\n" + indentConfig.indent.repeat(indentLevel)
238â†’        }
239â†’
240â†’    private fun wrapParameterInList(
241â†’        child: ASTNode,
242â†’        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
243â†’        autoCorrect: Boolean,
244â†’    ) {
245â†’        when (child.elementType) {
246â†’            LPAR -> {
247â†’                val prevLeaf = child.prevLeaf()
248â†’                if (!child.treeParent.isValueParameterListInFunctionType() &&
249â†’                    prevLeaf.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline()
250â†’                ) {
251â†’                    emit(child.startOffset, errorMessage(child), true)
252â†’                    if (autoCorrect) {
253â†’                        (prevLeaf as PsiWhiteSpace).delete()
254â†’                    }
255â†’                }
256â†’            }
257â†’            VALUE_PARAMETER,
258â†’            RPAR,
259â†’            -> {
260â†’                // aiming for
261â†’                // ... LPAR
262â†’                // <line indent + indentSize> VALUE_PARAMETER...
263â†’                // <line indent> RPAR
264â†’                val intendedIndent = intendedIndent(child)
265â†’                val prevLeaf = child.prevLeaf()
266â†’                if (prevLeaf is PsiWhiteSpace) {
267â†’                    if (prevLeaf.getText().contains("\n")) {
268â†’                        // The current child is already wrapped to a new line. Checking and fixing the
269â†’                        // correct size of the indent is the responsibility of the IndentationRule.
270â†’                        return
271â†’                    } else {
272â†’                        // The current child needs to be wrapped to a newline.
273â†’                        emit(child.startOffset, errorMessage(child), true)
274â†’                        if (autoCorrect) {
275â†’                            // The indentation is purely based on the previous leaf only. Note that in
276â†’                            // autoCorrect mode the indent rule, if enabled, runs after this rule and
277â†’                            // determines the final indentation. But if the indent rule is disabled then the
278â†’                            // indent of this rule is kept.
279â†’                            (prevLeaf as LeafPsiElement).rawReplaceWithText(intendedIndent)
280â†’                        }
281â†’                    }
282â†’                } else {
283â†’                    // Insert a new whitespace element in order to wrap the current child to a new line.
284â†’                    emit(child.startOffset, errorMessage(child), true)
285â†’                    if (autoCorrect) {
286â†’                        child.treeParent.addChild(PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(intendedIndent), child)
287â†’                    }
288â†’                }
289â†’                // Indentation of child nodes need to be fixed by the IndentationRule.
290â†’            }
291â†’        }
292â†’    }

294â†’    private fun ASTNode.isValueParameterListInFunctionType() =
295â†’        FUNCTION_TYPE ==
296â†’            takeIf { it.elementType == VALUE_PARAMETER_LIST }
297â†’                ?.treeParent
298â†’                ?.elementType

300â†’    private fun ASTNode.isOnLineExceedingMaxLineLength(): Boolean {
301â†’        val stopLeaf = nextLeaf { it.textContains('\n') }?.nextLeaf()
302â†’        val lineContent =
303â†’            prevLeaf { it.textContains('\n') }
304â†’                ?.leavesIncludingSelf()
305â†’                ?.takeWhile { it.prevLeaf() != stopLeaf }
306â†’                ?.joinToString(separator = "") { it.text }
307â†’                ?.substringAfter('\n')
308â†’                ?.substringBefore('\n')
309â†’                .orEmpty()
310â†’        return lineContent.length > maxLineLength
311â†’    }
312â†’
313â†’    private fun errorMessage(node: ASTNode) =
314â†’        when (node.elementType) {
315â†’            LPAR -> """Unnecessary newline before "(""""
316â†’            VALUE_PARAMETER ->
317â†’                "Parameter should start on a newline"
318â†’            RPAR -> """Missing newline before ")""""
319â†’            else -> throw UnsupportedOperationException()
320â†’        }

322â†’    private fun ASTNode.isFunWithTypeParameterListInFront() =
323â†’        treeParent
324â†’            .takeIf { elementType == FUN }
325â†’            ?.findChildByType(TYPE_PARAMETER_LIST)
326â†’            ?.children()
327â†’            ?.any { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
328â†’            ?: false
329â†’}
